qas.q: Recruiting misconduct definition.
qas.a: "These prohibitions apply from the first contact between a prospect, an applicant, or a recruit and the recruiter through entry-level training and for 6 months after the trainee completes all initial active duty training requirements basic military training and follow on technical training"

AFRS Vision
qas.a: Attract the most talented Airmen & Guardians to preserve the security of America.

qas.q: 4 groups of AFRS are located;

1. Hill AFB, UT (372 RCG)
2. Lackland AFB, TX (369 RCG)
3. New Cumberland, PA (360 RCG)
4. Air Force Reserve Command Recruiting Service Directorate; Robbins AFB, GA (367 RCG)

1. USA
2. Puerto Rico
3. Europe
4. Southeast Asia

Air Force Reserve Command recruiting falls under the __________ Recruiting Group of AFRS?
Stressors
qas.a: Any factor/ demand that has the potential to cause stress. (+ or -)

qas.q: Eustress
qas.a: A result from exhilarating experiences and is the stress of winning and achieving

qas.q: Distress
qas.a: Stress of losing, failing, overworking and not coping effectively (stressed out)

qas.q: Common symptoms of stress
The non-specific response to the body to any demand for change
